creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I suspect this bug is the same as the one fixed by https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=a1fadf7de25b973a308b86d04c4ada4fa8be193f .  I've merged it to stable/13 - is anyone experiencing the problem able to test this, either by updating to the latest stable/13 or applying the commit directly to 13.0?
